c.d: The range of live streaming content available on the platform, including genres like sports, gaming, entertainment, and more.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience provided by the app.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs) on which the app can be used.
The pricing model of the app, including free access, subscription fees, or pay-per-view options.
Interactive features such as live chat, virtual gifting, and community building tools.
